Driver and SPI communication interface for the BMA255 accelerometer with initialization, data handling, and configuration.


## Files
- **[bma255.c](bma255.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the BMA255 accelerometer, including initialization, data handling, and self-test functions.
- **[bma255.h](bma255.h.md)**: Header file for the BMA255 IMU driver, defining power modes, sleep durations, bandwidths, and ODR settings.
- **[bma255_private.h](bma255_private.h.md)**: Private functions and definitions for BMA255 IMU communication and control via SPI.
- **[bma255_regs.h](bma255_regs.h.md)**: Defines register addresses, flags, and configurations for the BMA255 accelerometer.
- **[bma255_spi.c](bma255_spi.c.md)**: SPI communication interface for the BMA255 sensor, including initialization and data transfer functions.
